name: Ultimate V60 technique
steps: Bloom 60g/45s; pour to 150g by 1:15; to 250g by 1:45; gentle swirl; drawdown by 3:30.
why: Two-pour structure for clarity and even extraction; forgiving on grind.
author: James Hoffmann

name: Aerocano (improved iced americano)
steps: Pull espresso over ice + water; steam/aerate briefly.
author: James Hoffmann

name: 4:6 Method
steps: First 40% in two pours controls sweetness/acidity; last 60% in 3 pours controls strength.
why: Tunable balance of sweetness vs. strength.
author: Tetsu Kasuya

name: Gong Fu with Hario Switch
steps: Multi-stage immersion + percolation hybrid for sweetness and clarity.
author: Lance Hedrick
